question: According to the chart data, during which period did online orders drop by the larger amount?

options.D: It cannot be determined from the chart

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2017-2019: 1282 → 867 (-415); 2022-2024: 187 → 40 (-147).
